description_long: This is a stylized doll with a mouse-like head, featuring large, angular ears and a prominent bow on top. The doll wears a turquoise dress adorned with black spots and a pink patch on the front, and matching turquoise shoes. Its face is painted with bold, contrasting blue and white patterns, giving it a whimsical, slightly abstract appearance. The arms are extended outward, ending in oversized black gloves with white finger details. The back of the doll is simpler, with the dress continuing and a small tail visible at the base. The overall construction suggests a soft, plush body with some rigid elements in the hands and head.
description: A whimsical mouse-themed doll in a turquoise spotted dress with a bow, black gloves, and bold blue-and-white facial markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, large bow, pink patch on the dress, and outstretched gloved hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the doll's protruding nose, the profile of the bow, and the layered dress with visible tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the bow, the simple back of the dress, and a small tail at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, bow, and the layered dress with tail.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a turquoise A-line dress with black polka dots, featuring a pink patch on the front and matching turquoise shoes. A large turquoise bow with black spots sits atop the head, evoking a playful, cartoon-inspired style reminiscent of Minnie Mouse.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, and the head facing forward. The torso is upright and static.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with painted features including a closed mouth and wide, stylized eyes, giving an abstract, emotionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is covered in white fabric with a large turquoise bow on top.
